infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SwipeShot needs access to your photos to help you quickly review, keep, or delete images. Your photos never leave your device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SwipeShot needs permission to save photos to your library.
